steps.name: create-branch

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0004 and t0008 are completed and available for import.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (research/, plan/, assets/, results/, code/).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: matplotlib visualization library for local use; no paper research required.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Research matplotlib polar plotting conventions, Okabe-Ito colour palette, and scipy bootstrap API.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0004 tuning-curve CSV schema and t0008 simulated-curve output for reuse as smoke-test fixtures.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design tuning_curve_viz module layout, API signatures, test strategy, and smoke-test plan.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only library; no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement tuning_curve_viz library with 4 plotting functions, CLI, tests, and run smoke tests.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute was provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: library-writing task; out-of-the-box exploration not applicable.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Summarize library deliverables, smoke-test outputs, and generated figures in results_summary.md and results_detailed.md.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: library-writing task; no quantitative metrics to compare against published results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions for downstream tasks that consume the library.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final reporting, capture task sessions, run pre-PR verificators, open PR.
